{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided in the documents, the layers of the epidermis from surface to deep layer are: stratum corneum, stratum spinosum, stratum granulosum, stratum lucidum, and stratum basale. Corneocytes are the cells in the stratum corneum, Merkel cells are in the stratum basale, melanocytes are also in the stratum basale, and Langerhans cells are in the stratum spinosum.
